opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My stomach has been burning for weeks, but tonight the pain became agonising and I vomited up something that looked like wet coffee grounds. I feel horribly dizzy and weak whenever I try to stand.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The burning got much worse tonight, I brought up dark grainy vomit, and I nearly fainted trying to get up — my spouse called because I can't stand safely.

symptom_narrative.onset: burning upper-tummy pain for about 6 weeks; the vomiting and dizziness came on tonight
symptom_narrative.duration: 6 weeks of pain, acutely much worse over the last few hours
symptom_narrative.character: burning, gnawing pain in the upper middle of the tummy that comes on shortly after eating; tonight it turned agonising and I vomited dark grainy material like wet coffee grounds
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the pain tonight is the worst it has been, and I feel drained and faint
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: high up in the middle of the tummy, just below the breastbone
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worse shortly after meals and wakes me at night; acutely worse tonight
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: eating seems to bring the pain on soon after
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling full very quickly when eating, losing weight without trying (about 4 kg), a black tarry foul-smelling bowel motion earlier today, and feeling very lightheaded and weak on standing
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: the burning has been building for weeks but I have never vomited like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: too weak and dizzy to walk safely; lying down feels a bit better

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: was told years ago I had a stomach bug infection (Helicobacter, the ulcer bug) on a test, but I never got treated for it

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with spouse who is present and made the call; not taking any regular medicines, and hasn't been using anti-inflammatory painkillers

objective_data_offered.value: looks very pale and sweaty, lying flat on the bed, appears drained and distressed
spouse reports an emesis basin by the bed containing dark, coffee-ground-looking material
spouse reports he passed a black, tarry, foul-smelling stool earlier today
feels very lightheaded and nearly faints each time he sits up or tries to stand; too weak to walk to the bathroom
